title: Jenkins Insurance Agency — The Woodlands TX Demo Site

requirements.summary: Create JenkinsPublicSite page component and register as index route
acceptanceCriteria: Browser tab/title reads exactly 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'
Page loads as the default index route
No mention of 'Los Angeles' or 'Reeves Insurance' anywhere on the page

file_operations.description: Create the Jenkins Insurance Agency single-page demo site component. Set document title using useEffect to 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'. Compose all Jenkins-specific section components (JenkinsHeader, JenkinsHero, JenkinsTrustBar, JenkinsCarrierBadges, JenkinsWhyChoose, JenkinsCoverageTypes, JenkinsAbout, JenkinsReviews, JenkinsQuoteContact, JenkinsBilingual, JenkinsFooter). Include JenkinsFloatingWhatsApp and JenkinsStickyMobileBar. Use semantic HTML5 structure with main element wrapping all sections.

Replace the current index route with JenkinsPublicSite. Import JenkinsPublicSite and update the route tree so the root path '/' renders JenkinsPublicSite instead of PublicSite. Keep all existing admin routes unchanged.

requirements.summary: Build sticky responsive navigation header with Jenkins branding
acceptanceCriteria: Header sticks to top on scroll
Phone number (281) 410-8934 appears as a tappable link
Mobile hamburger opens/closes full nav drawer
Gold 'Get Free Quote' button scrolls to the quote form section

file_operations.description: Create sticky header with navy (#1B3A6B) background. Left: Jenkins Insurance logo/wordmark (use generated jenkins-logo.dim_300x80.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/jenkins-logo.dim_300x80.png). Desktop nav: Home, Coverage, About, Reviews, Contact links using smooth scroll. Phone CTA: clickable tel:(281)410-8934 link styled as button. Gold (#F4B942) 'Get Free Quote' button scrolls to #quote anchor. Mobile: hamburger menu icon opens slide-down drawer with full nav + phone + quote CTA stacked vertically. On scroll, add drop shadow. Use useState for mobile menu open/close and scroll position. Use Tailwind for responsive layout and Montserrat font for nav text.

requirements.summary: Build full-screen hero section with two-column layout and trust signals
acceptanceCriteria: First 10 words on mobile viewport make a compelling value statement for a Texas insurance agent
CTA button links to tel:(281)410-8934
Location reads 'The Woodlands, TX' — not any other city
Hero is full viewport height on desktop, tall but scrollable on mobile

file_operations.description: Create full-screen hero section with navy-to-dark-navy gradient background. Two-column responsive layout (stacked on mobile). Left column: H1 'Your Local Insurance Agent in The Woodlands, TX' (ensure first 10 words on mobile communicate immediate value). Subheadline establishing trust and local expertise. Two CTA buttons: 'Get Your Free Quote' (gold, scrolls to #quote) and 'Call (281) 410-8934' (tel: link). Three inline trust badges: 'No Setup Fees', '5-Day Launch', '30-Day Guarantee' (icons + text). Right column: agent photo placeholder using frontend/public/assets/generated/agent-photo.dim_400x500.png with gold border frame. Floating Google review card overlay showing '4.9★ Rating' with decorative styling. Use min-h-screen on desktop, min-h-[80vh] on mobile. Fade-in animation on mount. Montserrat for H1, Open Sans for body.

requirements.summary: Build gold trust bar with animated count-up stats
acceptanceCriteria: Bar uses gold #F4B942 background with navy text
Count-up animation triggers on scroll into view
All 4 stats visible on mobile in a 2x2 grid

file_operations.description: Create gold (#F4B942) horizontal stats bar. Display 4 stats: '500+ Families Served', '4.9★ Google Rating', '20+ Carrier Partners', '100% Local Texas Agent'. Use IntersectionObserver to trigger count-up animation from 0 to final value when section enters viewport (threshold 0.1). Each stat in a responsive flex container (4 columns on desktop, 2×2 grid on mobile). Navy (#1B3A6B) text color. Use requestAnimationFrame or a simple interval for count-up effect. Clean up observer on unmount.

requirements.summary: Build carrier partner badge row with hover effects
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 carriers listed
Badges are responsive and wrap cleanly on mobile
Hover effect applies colorization or opacity change

file_operations.description: Create carrier badges section with H2 'Trusted Carrier Partners'. Display 6 carrier badges: Progressive, Travelers, Nationwide, Liberty Mutual, Safeco, Foremost. Use placeholder div badges with carrier name text (or SVG logos if available in assets). Apply grayscale filter by default, remove filter on hover (CSS: filter: grayscale(1) → grayscale(0)). Responsive flex layout wrapping on smaller screens (3 per row on desktop, 2 per row on tablet, 1-2 per row on mobile). Light background section. Use Montserrat for heading.

requirements.summary: Build 'Why Choose Jenkins Insurance' section with 3 cards
acceptanceCriteria: 3 cards display in a row on desktop, stacked on mobile
Hover effect is visible on desktop
No mention of any location other than The Woodlands TX

file_operations.description: Create 'Why Choose Jenkins Insurance' section with white/cream background. H2 section heading. Three cards in flex row (stack on mobile): (1) 'Independent Agent' — Access to 20+ carriers for best rates, (2) 'Local The Woodlands Expert' — Knows TX market personally, (3) 'Personalized Service' — Real agent not a call center. Each card: icon (use Lucide icons or inline SVG), title (Montserrat bold), body copy (Open Sans), white card background with border. Hover effect: translateY(-4px) + box-shadow lift. Responsive grid (3 cols on desktop, 1 col on mobile). Ensure all copy references The Woodlands TX only.

requirements.summary: Build 3×2 coverage types grid with quote links
acceptanceCriteria: All 6 coverage types present
'Get a Quote' links scroll to the quote form section
Grid is 3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile

file_operations.description: Create coverage types section with H2 'Insurance Coverage We Offer'. 3×2 grid (3 cols desktop, 2 cols tablet, 1 col mobile) containing 6 cards: Home Insurance, Auto Insurance, Business Insurance, Flood Insurance, RV Insurance, Life Insurance. Each card: icon, title (navy header bg with white text), short description (white card body), 'Get a Quote' link button (gold accent) that scrolls smoothly to #quote anchor. Use grid layout with gap. Icons can use existing generated assets or Lucide icons. Montserrat for titles, Open Sans for descriptions.

requirements.summary: Build navy 'About C. Jenkins' section with credentials and stats
acceptanceCriteria: Agent name reads 'C. Jenkins' — no other name
Location references The Woodlands TX only
Section is responsive with stacked layout on mobile

file_operations.description: Create 'About C. Jenkins' section with navy (#1B3A6B) background and white/gold text. Two-column layout (stacked on mobile). Left column: agent photo placeholder (use frontend/public/assets/generated/agent-photo.dim_400x500.png), credential badges below photo: 'Licensed TX Agent', 'Independent Broker', '10+ Years Experience' (small badge pills with gold borders). Right column: H2 'Meet C. Jenkins', personal story copy about serving The Woodlands TX community (2-3 paragraphs). Three inline stat boxes in a row: 'Families Served', 'Carriers', 'Years' with large numbers and icons. Use Montserrat for heading and stat numbers, Open Sans for body copy. Responsive padding and stacking.

requirements.summary: Build Google Reviews section with testimonials and scroll animations
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate 4.9★ rating displayed prominently
3 testimonial cards with 5-star ratings
Cards animate in on scroll
Reviews reference The Woodlands TX area

file_operations.description: Create Google Reviews section with light background. Top: aggregate rating display showing '4.9/5' large number, 5 gold stars, '47 reviews' subtitle, 'Google Reviews' badge. Below: 3 testimonial cards in flex row (stack on mobile). Each card: reviewer name, 5 gold stars, review text (relevant to Texas insurance needs), 'Posted on Google' small badge at bottom. Use IntersectionObserver (threshold 0.1) to trigger staggered fade-in animation (opacity 0→1, translateY(30px)→0) on scroll with delays (0ms, 150ms, 300ms). White card backgrounds with subtle shadow. Montserrat for reviewer names, Open Sans for review text.

requirements.summary: Build quote request + contact section with form and contact card
acceptanceCriteria: Section has id='quote' for scroll targeting
Address reads '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354'
Phone reads '(281) 410-8934'
Form submits via the existing useSubmitQuote hook or equivalent
Gold submit button is prominent

file_operations.description: Create quote/contact section with id='quote' and navy gradient background. Two-column layout (stacked on mobile). Left column: quote form with fields Full Name, Phone, Email, ZIP Code, Coverage Type (dropdown: Home, Auto, Business, Flood, RV, Life), Best Time to Call (dropdown: Morning, Afternoon, Evening, Any Time). Gold submit button 'Get Your Free Quote'. Use useSubmitQuote hook from frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts for submission. Show success state after submit. Right column: contact info card with white background: Address '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', Phone '(281) 410-8934' (clickable tel: link), business hours 'Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-2pm', WhatsApp link button (opens wa.me/12814108934). Use Montserrat for headings, Open Sans for form labels and contact text. Form validation and error states.

acceptanceCriteria: Section contains both English and Spanish text
CTA button links to (281) 410-8934
Section is visually distinct (e.g., gold accent background stripe)

file_operations.description: Create bilingual section with gold (#F4B942) accent stripe background. Center-aligned content. Display both English and Spanish text: 'We Speak Spanish — Hablamos Español' (H2 or H3, Montserrat). Body copy: 'Se Habla Español. Llámenos hoy para una cotización gratuita.' CTA button: 'Call Now / Llame Ahora' linking to tel:(281)410-8934 (navy button with white text). Icon of phone or bilingual symbol. Responsive padding. Keep text concise and inviting.

requirements.summary: Build 3-column footer with branding, links, and service areas
acceptanceCriteria: Address and phone are correct everywhere in footer
All service areas are in Texas — no other state
Footer is 3 columns on desktop, stacked on mobile

file_operations.description: Create footer with dark navy background and white/gold text. Three columns (stack on mobile). Column 1: Jenkins Insurance logo (jenkins-logo.dim_300x80.png), tagline 'Your Local Insurance Agent', address '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', phone '(281) 410-8934' (tel: link). Column 2: 'Quick Links' heading, list of coverage types (Home, Auto, Business, Flood, RV, Life) as links scrolling to #quote. Column 3: 'Service Areas' heading, list of cities: The Woodlands, Conroe, Spring, Tomball, Humble, Cypress (all TX). Bottom strip (full width): '© 2025 Jenkins Insurance. All rights reserved.' | 'Licensed in Texas' | Privacy Policy link. Use Montserrat for headings, Open Sans for links and body text.

requirements.summary: Implement floating WhatsApp button visible on all screen sizes
acceptanceCriteria: Button visible on mobile (≤640px), tablet (641–1024px), and desktop (>1024px) — never hidden
Tapping opens wa.me/12814108934
Pulsing green animation ring is present
Button does not overlap or obscure critical content

file_operations.description: Create fixed position WhatsApp button (bottom-right corner, z-index high). Green circle (#25D366) with WhatsApp icon (use Lucide MessageCircle or inline SVG). Pulsing animation ring using CSS keyframes (scale pulse effect on ::before pseudo-element). Opens https://wa.me/12814108934 in new tab (_blank, noopener). Must be visible on ALL breakpoints (no media query hiding). Position: fixed bottom-6 right-6 (adjust on mobile to bottom-20 to avoid overlapping mobile sticky bar). Accessible label 'Chat on WhatsApp'. Test visibility on mobile, tablet, desktop.

requirements.summary: Implement mobile sticky bottom action bar with Call and Quote buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Visible only on mobile (≤768px)
'Call Now' dials (281) 410-8934
'Get Quote' scrolls smoothly to the quote form
Does not overlap the WhatsApp floating button

file_operations.description: Create mobile-only sticky bottom action bar (fixed position, bottom 0, z-index high). Display only on screens ≤768px (Tailwind: block md:hidden). Two side-by-side buttons filling width: 'Call Now' (tel:(281)410-8934, navy bg, white text) and 'Get Quote' (gold bg, navy text, smooth scrolls to #quote anchor). Use flex layout with equal width buttons. Safe positioning to not overlap WhatsApp button (WhatsApp should be positioned above this bar). Drop shadow for elevation.

requirements.summary: Apply global design system with fonts, colors, and scroll animations
acceptanceCriteria: Montserrat used for all headings site-wide
Open Sans used for all body text
Navy/Gold/Green color system consistent across all sections
Scroll animations trigger on every section as user scrolls down

file_operations.description: Add Google Fonts import for Montserrat (weights 400,500,600,700) and Open Sans (weights 400,600). Define Jenkins brand CSS custom properties under :root: --jenkins-navy: #1B3A6B; --jenkins-gold: #F4B942; --jenkins-green: #27AE60; --jenkins-cream: #FAF9F6. Add font-family utilities: .font-heading (Montserrat), .font-body (Open Sans). Add global scroll-smooth behavior. Define reusable animation classes for scroll-in effects: .fade-in-up (translateY(30px)→0, opacity 0→1, transition). Ensure IntersectionObserver usage in components applies these classes.

Extend Tailwind theme with Jenkins brand colors: jenkins: { navy: '#1B3A6B', gold: '#F4B942', green: '#27AE60', cream: '#FAF9F6' }. Add fontFamily: { heading: ['Montserrat', 'sans-serif'], body: ['Open Sans', 'sans-serif'] }. Ensure all Jenkins components can reference these Tailwind utilities (e.g., bg-jenkins-navy, text-jenkins-gold, font-heading, font-body).

Create a reusable custom hook useScrollAnimation that returns a ref and an isVisible boolean. Uses IntersectionObserver with threshold 0.1 to detect when an element enters the viewport. Returns cleanup on unmount. Components can use this hook to conditionally apply fade-in classes when isVisible becomes true. This centralizes scroll animation logic across all Jenkins sections.

requirements.summary: Optimize frontend bundle for sub-3-second mobile load time
acceptanceCriteria: Images use loading='lazy' attribute
No unnecessary third-party scripts block rendering
Lighthouse performance score ≥ 85 on mobile simulation

file_operations.description: Update HTML entry point: add preconnect hints for Google Fonts (<link rel='preconnect' href='https://fonts.googleapis.com'>). Update page title meta to 'Independent Insurance Agent | The Woodlands TX | Jenkins Insurance'. Update meta description to reference The Woodlands TX. Update Open Graph and Twitter card meta tags for Jenkins Insurance branding. Replace or remove old Reeves Insurance Schema.org structured data with Jenkins Insurance Agency structured data (name: 'Jenkins Insurance', address: '33018 Tamina Rd, The Woodlands TX 77354', telephone: '(281) 410-8934', areaServed: 'The Woodlands, TX').

Ensure all images in JenkinsHero use loading='lazy' attribute. Reference generated images from frontend/public/assets/generated/ using correct paths (agent-photo.dim_400x500.png, jenkins-logo.dim_300x80.png). If using hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as background, apply it via CSS background-image or img with lazy loading. Avoid blocking render with large images.
Add loading='lazy' to agent photo img element in JenkinsAbout section. Ensure images do not block initial render.
